title: prunella longifolia
intro: Prunella longifolia, also known as self-heal or heal-all, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce fever. It has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Prunella longifolia can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the treatment of various health conditions, such as respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems.
